ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Define reusable snippets referenced as {{GLOBAL_VAR:<name>}}. Snippets support other QuickAdd tokens and expand before VALUE/VDATE/etc.
ast.target: 定义可重用的代码片段，引用方式为 {{GLOBAL_VAR:<name>}}。代码片段支持其他 QuickAdd 令牌，并在 VALUE/VDATE 等之前展开。

Export QuickAdd Package

Select choices to bundle. Dependencies are added automatically.

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Show updates only on major releases (new features, breaking changes)
ast.target: 仅在主要版本发布时显示更新（新功能、破坏性变更）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Show updates on each new release
ast.target: 每次新版本发布时显示更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting for this choice. 'Always' forces the one-page modal even if disabled globally; 'Never' disables it even if enabled globally.
ast.target: 覆盖此选项的全局设置。“始终”强制使用单页模态框，即使全局禁用；“从不”则禁用它，即使全局启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to arrange the new pane relative to the current one
ast.target: 相对于当前窗格排列新窗格的方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to display the opened file

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focus the opened tab immediately after opening
ast.target: 打开后立即聚焦到新打开的标签页

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced / legacy: this executes any `<% %>` anywhere in the destination file (including inside code blocks).
ast.target: 高级/遗留功能：这会执行目标文件中任何位置的 `<% %>`（包括代码块内部）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether this Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}}. Does not affect {{SELECTED}}.
ast.target: 控制此捕获是否使用当前编辑器选区作为 {{VALUE}}。不影响 {{SELECTED}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path. Supports format syntax (use trailing '/' for folders).
ast.target: 相对于库的路径。支持格式语法（文件夹请使用尾部的 '/'）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a file, folder, or format syntax (e.g., {{DATE}})
ast.target: 选择文件、文件夹或格式语法（例如 {{DATE}}）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a card from the canvas below, or paste an exact node id.
ast.target: 从下方画布中选择一张卡片，或粘贴确切的节点 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Formats the value as a task.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the captured file in the current note.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应如何在当前笔记中插入指向捕获文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the link when appending
ast.target: 追加时链接的放置位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert capture after specified text. Accepts format syntax. Tip: use a heading (starts with #) to target a section. Blank line handling is configurable below.
ast.target: 在指定文本后插入捕获内容。接受格式语法。提示：使用标题（以 # 开头）来定位某个章节。空行处理可在下方配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert captured content on the same line, immediately after the matched text (no newline added).
ast.target: 在同一行、匹配文本之后立即插入捕获内容（不添加换行符）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace everything after the matched text up to end-of-line.
ast.target: 替换匹配文本之后直到行尾的所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the text at the end of the matched section instead of the top.
ast.target: 将文本放置在匹配章节的末尾，而不是顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also include the section’s subsections (requires target to be a heading starting with #). Subsections are headings inside the section.
ast.target: 同时包含该章节的子章节（要求目标是以 # 开头的标题）。子章节是该章节内部的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.
ast.target: 如果未找到“插入后”的行，则创建它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format of the capture.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create the file in the specified folder. If multiple folders are specified, you will be prompted for which folder to create the file in.
ast.target: 在指定文件夹中创建文件。如果指定了多个文件夹，系统将提示您选择在哪个文件夹中创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get prompted to choose from both the selected folders and their subfolders when creating the note.
ast.target: 创建笔记时，系统将提示您从所选文件夹及其子文件夹中进行选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the file in the same folder as the currently active file. Will not create the file if there is no active file.
ast.target: 在当前活动文件所在的文件夹中创建文件。如果没有活动文件，则不会创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the created file in the current note.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应如何在当前笔记中插入指向已创建文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether QuickAdd should ask what to do, update the existing file, create another file, or keep the existing file.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 是询问操作、更新现有文件、创建另一个文件还是保留现有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model the AI Assistant will use
ast.target: AI 助手将使用的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.
ast.target: 用于存储 AI 助手输出的变量名称，即 {{value:output}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新词元在已有文本中的出现频率对其进行惩罚，从而降低模型逐字重复同一行的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新词元是否在已有文本中出现对其进行惩罚，从而增加模型谈论新话题的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the file. Supports formatting like {{DATE}}, {{VALUE}}, etc.
ast.target: 文件路径。支持 {{DATE}}、{{VALUE}} 等格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose tab, split, window, or sidebar
ast.target: 选择标签页、分屏、窗口或侧边栏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bring the opened file to the foreground
ast.target: 将打开的文件置于前台

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加一个 Obsidian 命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add user script - type the name or click Browse
ast.target: 添加用户脚本 - 输入名称或点击浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how this condition should be evaluated.
ast.target: 选择此条件应如何被评估。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the macro variable to inspect (without the $ prefix).
ast.target: 要检查的宏变量名称（不带 $ 前缀）。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to interpret the comparison value.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 相对于库的 JavaScript 文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Execute this macro when Obsidian starts

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shown in the choice picker search box when this multi choice opens. Leave blank to use the multi name.
ast.target: 当此多选选项打开时，显示在选项选择器搜索框中。留空则使用多选名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add will append new models. Replace will overwrite existing models with the selected list.
ast.target: “添加”将追加新模型。“替换”将用所选列表覆盖现有模型。

ast.target: 从 SecretStorage 中选择一个密钥

ast.source: The endpoint for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where QuickAdd looks when browsing or syncing models for this provider.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 在为此提供商浏览或同步模型时查找的位置。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default model for the AI Assistant

ast.source: Show status messages from the AI Assistant
ast.target: 显示来自 AI 助手的状态消息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 面向开发者的 Git 信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bundle or import QuickAdd automations as reusable packages.
ast.target: 将 QuickAdd 自动化打包或导入为可重用的包。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when content is captured successfully to confirm the operation completed.
ast.target: 当内容成功捕获时显示通知，以确认操作已完成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when an input prompt is cancelled without submitting. Disable this to avoid extra notices when dismissing prompts.
ast.target: 当输入提示被取消而未提交时显示通知。禁用此选项可避免在关闭提示时出现额外通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use multi-line input prompt instead of single-line input prompt
ast.target: 使用多行输入提示而非单行输入提示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep drafts when closing input prompts so they can be restored on reopen. Drafts are stored only for this session.
ast.target: 关闭输入提示时保留草稿，以便重新打开时可以恢复。草稿仅在本次会话中存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}} and may skip the prompt. When disabled, Capture always prompts for {{VALUE}}.
ast.target: 启用后，捕获会使用当前编辑器选区作为 {{VALUE}}，并可能跳过提示。禁用后，捕获始终会提示输入 {{VALUE}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcodes for natural language date parsing. One per line: alias = phrase. Example: tm = tomorrow.
ast.target: 用于自然语言日期解析的短代码。每行一个：别名 = 短语。示例：tm = tomorrow。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add QuickAdd icon to the sidebar ribbon. Requires a reload.
ast.target: 将 QuickAdd 图标添加到侧边栏功能区。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string used to join multiple LLM responses together. The default is a newline.
ast.target: 用于连接多个LLM响应的字符串。默认为换行符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string used to separate chunks of text. The default is a newline.
ast.target: 用于分隔文本块的字符串。默认为换行符。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use editor selection as default value
ast.target: 使用编辑器选区作为默认值

ast.source: Create file if it doesn't exist

ast.target: “考虑子章节”要求目标为标题（以 # 开头）

ast.target: 已添加自定义提供商。点击“编辑”进行配置。

ast.source: Select at least one choice to export.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个选项以导出。

ast.target: 包已复制但存在警告。请查看下方详情。

ast.target: 保存前请输入文件路径。

ast.source: Package saved with warnings. Review details below.
ast.target: 包已保存但存在警告。请查看下方详情。

ast.target: 请先加载一个包再进行导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Canvas capture skipped link insertion because no Markdown editor is focused.
ast.target: 画布捕获跳过了链接插入，因为没有聚焦的 Markdown 编辑器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes trailing digits only. Example: Draft009.md -> Draft010.md.
ast.target: 仅更改尾随数字。示例：Draft009.md -> Draft010.md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keeps the original name and adds a duplicate marker. Example: Project Plan.md -> Project Plan (1).md.
ast.target: 保留原始名称并添加重复标记。示例：Project Plan.md -> Project Plan (1).md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leaves the file unchanged and opens the existing file.
ast.target: 保持文件不变并打开现有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mutual exclusion of insertAfter and writeToBottomOfFile settings. If insertAfter is enabled, writeToBottomOfFile is disabled. To support changes in settings UI.
ast.target: insertAfter 和 writeToBottomOfFile 设置互斥。如果启用 insertAfter，则禁用 writeToBottomOfFile。以支持设置 UI 中的更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set version to the current plugin version.
ast.target: 将版本设置为当前插件版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add default AI providers to the settings.
ast.target: 向设置中添加默认 AI 提供商。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Migrate legacy openFileInNewTab settings to new fileOpening format
ast.target: 将旧版 openFileInNewTab 设置迁移到新的 fileOpening 格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Backfill missing file opening defaults for older choices
ast.target: 为旧选项补充缺失的文件打开默认值

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ensure every AI provider has a discovery mode so browsing works without models.dev
ast.target: 确保每个 AI 提供商都有发现模式，以便在没有 models.dev 的情况下也能浏览

ast.name: description

ast.target: 将 AI 提供商 API 密钥移入 Obsidian SecretStorage

ast.name: description
